domestic.details: Historic treble: PL, FA Cup, Champions League

european.details: Won Champions League defeating Bayern Munich 2-1 (May 26, 1999)

domestic.details: FA Cup: Defeated Millwall 3-0 (May 22, 2004). Goals: Cristiano Ronaldo, Ruud van Nistelrooy x2 (1 pen)
Won PL and League Cup. Lost CL Final and FA Cup final
FA Cup: Defeated Portsmouth 1-0 (May 15, 2010). Goal: Didier Drogba (59')
FA Cup: Defeated Stoke City 1-0 AET (May 14, 2011). Goal: Yaya Toure
FA Cup: Defeated Liverpool 2-1 (May 5, 2012). Goals: Ramires (11'), Drogba (52')

european.details: Won Champions League defeating Bayern Munich on penalties (May 19, 2012)

domestic.details: FA Cup: Defeated Hull City 3-2 AET (May 17, 2014). Goals: Cazorla (free-kick), Koscielny, Aaron Ramsey (AET)

FA Cup: Defeated Aston Villa 4-0 (May 30, 2015). Goals: Walcott, Sanchez, Mertesacker, Giroud

League Cup: Defeated Liverpool 1-1, won 3-1 on pens (Feb 28, 2016)
FA Cup: Defeated Crystal Palace 2-1 AET (May 21, 2016). Goals: Juan Mata (87'), Jesse Lingard (AET)
FA Cup: Defeated Chelsea 2-1 (May 27, 2017). Goals: Alexis Sanchez, Aaron Ramsey
League Cup: Defeated Arsenal 3-0 (March 25, 2018)

european.details: Won Europa League defeating Ajax 2-0 (May 24, 2017). Goals: Paul Pogba (18'), Henrikh Mkhitaryan (48')

domestic.details: FA Cup: Defeated Manchester United 1-0 (May 19, 2018). Goal: Eden Hazard (22', pen)
League Cup: Defeated Arsenal 3-0 (March 25, 2018)

Won Champions League but no domestic cups

domestic.details: FA Cup: Defeated Chelsea 0-0, won 6-5 on pens (May 14, 2022). League Cup: Defeated Chelsea 11-10 pens (Feb 27, 2022)
